notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
Agar koi student exam me fail/back aaya hai ya repeat karna chahta hai, aur dubara admission lena chahta hai, to usko college me ek form bhar ke jama karna hoga.

📅Last date: 20 May 2026

Agar 20 May ke baad form jama kiya, to college usko accept nahi karega.
notices.title: Fail/back
